versions.version_description: This version contains tabs and chords for the whole song, including the main riff and solo. Playing acoustically, I think it sounds great transposed down two, with the Capo on 2nd Fret.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Want You To Want Me

content:
#-----------------------------PLEASE NOTE-------------------------------------#
#This OLGA file is the author's own work and represents their interpretation  #
#of the song. You may only use this file for private study, scholarship, or   #
#research. Remember to view this file in Courier, or other monospaced font.   #
#See http://www.olga.net/faq/ for more information.                           #
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#

Subject: b/b_52s/roam.crd

ROAM
(waldrop/pierson/schneider/strickland/wilson)

FROM "COSMIC THING" by the B-52's

[tab]B|--3-1----0-------3----1--0---0-|
G|-----------2-------------------|
    I hear a wind, whis-tl-ing air
    Whis-tl-ing i-in my ear[/tab]

[ch]E7[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]/[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Bsus[/ch]

[tab][ch]E7[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bsus[/ch] [ch]B[/ch](no 3rd)
Boy Mercury shootin' through ev'ry degree[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bsus[/ch] [ch]B[/ch](no 3rd)
Oh-ho girl dancin' down those dirty and dusty trail-ai-ails[/tab]

CHORUS:
[tab]        [ch]E7[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
Take it hip to hip, rocket through the wilderness-e-e-e-esss[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E7[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bsus[/ch]
Around the world the trip begins with a ki-i-i-i-isss[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Bsus[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch](no 3rd)
Roam if you want to, roam around the world![/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Bsus[/ch] [ch]B[/ch](no3rd)
Roam if you want to, without wings, without wheels[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Bsus[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch](no 3rd)
Roam if you want to, roam around the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Bsus[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch](no 3rd)
Roam if you want to, without anything but the love we feel[/tab]

[ch]E7[/ch]     [ch]E7[/ch]/[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Bsus[/ch]

Skip the air, strip for the sunset
Ride the arrow to the target was

CHORUS

Fly the great big sky, see the great big sea
Kick through the continents, bustin' boundaries

CHORUS

END:
[tab]        [ch]E7[/ch]                 [ch]G/E[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]
Take it hip to hip rock it through the wilderness (repeat)[/tab]

**********************************************************************************
ONE MORE GEM TRANSCRIBED BY NONE OTHER THAN HENRY STEWART <stewarts@mindspring.com>
**********************************************************************************
